payload.title: Long Island Rail Road Committee Work Plan

payload.description: MTA Board committee overseeing Long Island Rail Road operations

warnings: entity.parent_organization is relation context, not a closed enum or identity key. Parent organizations are relation context. Suggested relation: part_of_agency.

payload.claim_text: The Key Performance Metrics book provides the MTA Board and members of the public with a comprehensive overview of monthly LIRR and Metro-North performance indicators including ridership, financial results, train performance, capital project progress, community events, and safety and security.
payload.subject: Key Performance Metrics Reports

payload.claim_text: A Monthly report will be provided highlighting major accomplishments and progress on key initiatives and performance indicators.
payload.subject: President's Report

payload.claim_text: A monthly report will be given highlighting key operating performance statistics and indicators.
payload.subject: Chief's Report

payload.claim_text: A monthly report will be given highlighting key safety performance statistics and indicators.
payload.subject: Safety Report

payload.claim_text: MTA Police will highlight the significant police activities incurred during the month reported.
payload.subject: MTA Police Report

payload.claim_text: A monthly report will be provided that compares the Railroad's actual financial performance against its budget and/or forecast.
payload.subject: Financial Report

payload.claim_text: List of procurement action items requiring Board approval and items for Committee and Board information. The Non-Competitive items will be first, followed by the Competitive items and then the Ratifications. The list will include items that need a 2/3 vote of the Board for approval.
payload.subject: Procurements

payload.description: Public comment will be accepted on the 2025 Budget.

tool_args.label: November Timetable Change & Fall Trackwork Programs

payload.description: The Committee will be advised of plans to adjust schedules.
The Committee will be advised of plans to adjust schedules.
The Committee will recommend action to the Board on the Final Proposed Budget for 2025.
The Committee Chair will present a draft Long Island Rail Road Committee Work Plan for 2025 that will address initiatives to be reported throughout the year.
The Committee will be advised of plans to adjust schedules.
Quarterly report to the Committee providing data on key EEO and Human Resources indicators relating to LIRR's Equal Employment Opportunity and Diversity efforts.
Annual review of Long Island Committee Charter for Committee revision/approval.
The Committee will approve the Proposed Long Island Rail Road Committee Work Plan for 2025.
The Committee will be advised of plans to adjust schedules.
The Agency will present its revised 2025 Financial Plan reflecting the 2025 Adopted Budget and an updated Financial Plan for 2025.
A review of the prior year's performance of railroad service will be provided to the Committee.

A report will be presented to the Committee on Agency ridership trends during 2024 based on monthly ticket sales data and the results of train ridership counts conducted by the Agency.
The Committee will be advised of plans to adjust schedules.
Quarterly report to the Committee providing data on key EEO and Human Resources indicators relating to LIRR's Equal Employment Opportunity and Diversity efforts.
A review of the prior year's budget results and their implications for current and future budget performance will be presented to the Committee.
The Committee will be advised of plans to adjust schedules.
The Committee will be advised of plans to adjust schedules.
Quarterly report to the Committee providing data on key EEO and Human Resources indicators relating to LIRR's Equal Employment Opportunity and Diversity efforts.
The agency will provide Mid-Year update on Railroad Operations.

payload.description: The Committee will be advised of plans to adjust schedules.
Public comment will be accepted on the 2026 Budget.
The agency will provide the 2025 Mid-Year Forecast financial information for revenue and expense by month.

Quarterly report to the Committee providing data on key EEO and Human Resources indicators relating to LIRR's Equal Employment Opportunity and Diversity efforts.
The agency will provide comprehensive report on the Safety/Security.
